PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-02-2024 Continued To Apr-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janelle Hansen appeared by zoom for Terry Capuz (petitioner).

Mrs. Hansen stated that the additional filing that was requested by the examiner has been submitted for filing and that it arrived at the court on March 28, 2024. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to April 9, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mrs. Hansen's request to extend the temporary letters is granted.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.
